login.title: Sign in to your space
login.subtitle: Secure, persistent, and confidential access.
login.footer: After signing in, you will be redirected to your conversation space.
login.checkEmail: Check your email. We sent you a link to sign in.
login.error: Could not sign in. Please try again.

subscription.title: Subscription
subscription.description: Full access to conversations and knots.

chat.newConversationConfirm: Start a new conversation? You will lose the progress of the current one.

voiceError.audioTooShort: The recording is too short. Speak a bit longer and try again.
voiceError.notSupported: Your browser does not support voice recording. Try another browser or type your message.
voiceError.apiUnavailable: Could not connect to the transcription service. Check your connection and try again.
voiceError.noSpeechDetected: No speech was detected in the recording. Please try again.
